nasb.text: The sons of the wife of Hodiah, the sister of Naham, were the fathers of Keilah the Garmite and Eshtemoa the Maacathite.

esv.text: The sons of the wife of Hodiah, the sister of Naham, were the fathers of Keilah the Garmite and Eshtemoa the Maacathite.

cnv.text: 荷第雅的妻子、拿含的妹妹的兒子是迦米人基伊拉的父親和瑪迦人以實提摩的父親。

ccb.text: 荷第雅的妻子是拿含的妹妹，她的儿子们是迦米人基伊拉和玛迦人以实提摩的父亲。
